title: Umami Crispy Norwegian Potato Roast
description: Earthy, crispy roasted potatoes tossed with fresh herbs and bright gherkin relish, finished with a savory deglaze, a vegetarian adventure inspired by Norwegian flavors.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and lightly oil a large tagliere.
Toss the cubed potatoes with olive oil, sea salt, black pepper, rosemary, and thyme until evenly coated.
Spread the potatoes in a single layer on the prepared tagliere.
Roast for 25 minutes, turning once, until golden brown and crispy.
While the potatoes roast, heat a skillet over medium heat and deglaze the tagliere with vegetable broth and soy sauce, scraping up any browned bits.
Remove the tagliere from the oven and transfer the roasted potatoes to a serving dish.
Pour the deglaze sauce over the potatoes and stir gently to coat.
Fold in the gherkin relish, spring onions, and toasted sesame seeds, then garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
